health_conditions: dog with CCL tear (canine cranial cruciate ligament tear) - initially requiring surgery per veterinary assessment

compounds.frequency: mostly oral with some local injections

benefits.description: Dog healed knee ligament CCL tear without requiring surgery; marked difference in limping after treatment started; dog had been limping badly for months before treatment

protocol_notes: Treatment duration approximately 90 days. Primarily oral administration with a few local injections. Veterinarian had recommended surgery prior to BPC treatment.
